input.sql: update t_account set password = ifnull(password, ?) where account_id = ?

output.sql: update `encrypt_ds`.t_account set cipher_password = ifnull(cipher_password, ?), assisted_query_password = ifnull(assisted_query_password, ?), like_query_password = ifnull(like_query_password, ?) where account_id = ?

input.sql: update t_account set password = COALESCE(password, ?) where account_id = ?

output.sql: update t_account set cipher_password = COALESCE(cipher_password, ?), assisted_query_password = COALESCE(assisted_query_password, ?), like_query_password = COALESCE(like_query_password, ?) where account_id = ?

update `encrypt_ds`.`t_account` set `cipher_password` = ifnull(`cipher_password`, ?), `assisted_query_password` = ifnull(`assisted_query_password`, ?), `like_query_password` = ifnull(`like_query_password`, ?) where `account_id` = ?
